title: Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI): completing your annual declaration
body: "Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI) agreements last either 3 or 5 years, depending on which actions you selected.   You must submit an ‘annual declaration’ each year of your SFI agreement. This is to confirm you have complied, or expect to have complied, with your agreement’s obligations for that year.   When you must submit an annual declaration   You must submit your annual declaration by the end of the relevant agreement year. When you must do this will depend on your SFI agreement’s start date.   Your annual declaration will usually be available to complete in the Rural Payments service during the last 2 months of each agreement year. The RPA will let you know when it is available.   If you do not submit your annual declaration, the RPA may:     delay the fourth instalment of your payment for that agreement year    regard it as a breach of your agreement     Deadlines for submitting annual declarations   The table shows the usual time period for submitting your annual declaration, based on your agreement start date.      Agreement year start date Annual declaration available Annual declaration submission deadline     1 January 1 November 31 December   1 February 1 December 31 January   1 March 1 January 28 February (see note after the table)   1 April 1 February 31 March   1 May 1 March 30 April   1 June 1 April 31 May   1 July 1 May 30 June   1 August 1 June 31 July   1 September 1 July 31 August   1 October 1 August 30 September   1 November 1 September 31 October   1 December 1 October 30 November     Note: 29 February in a leap year.   How to complete your annual declaration   When the RPA tells you that your annual declaration is available to complete, sign in to the Rural Payments service.   From your ‘Business overview’ screen, select either:     ‘Sustainable Farming Incentive 2023’ to complete an annual declaration for an SFI 2023 agreement    ‘Apply for the Expanded Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI) Offer’ to complete an annual declaration for an SFI 2024 agreement     Click on ‘View Annual Declaration’. You need to either:     confirm you’ve complied, or expect to have complied, with the obligations under your SFI agreement    tell RPA why you’ve been unable to comply with the obligations under your SFI agreement     If your agreement includes rotational SFI actions, you’ll need to also complete and submit your rotational actions declaration.   Further information about the annual declaration   Read the relevant SFI scheme information for your agreement:     SFI handbook for SFI 2023 offer, if you have an SFI 2023 agreement    SFI scheme information for the expanded offer for 2024 (SFI 2024), if you applied for an SFI 2024 agreement by 11 March 2025    SFI scheme information for the re-opened SFI 2024 offer, if you were eligible to apply for an SFI 2024 agreement during summer 2025    "
